# Missing Files Report

Generated: 2026-05-31 14:30:37

The following optional expected derivatives were not found after organization:

- `ocr\vol_1\abbyy.gz`
- `ocr\vol_2\abbyy.gz`

The missing `abbyy.gz` files are ABBYY OCR XML derivatives. They are distinct from `hocr_pageindex.json.gz` and `hocr_searchtext.txt.gz`. Their absence is not blocking because DJVU text, DJVU XML, HOCR, page-number JSON, and scandata XML are available.

Unrecognized Internet Archive derivatives were preserved under each volume's derivatives\other\ directory.
